purpose: JUCEApplication entry point. Initialises ApplicationProperties, the date-stamped FileLogger, LookAndFeel_V4, and the singleton IconMenu. Implements the global getAppProperties() accessor used throughout the codebase.
invariants: getAppProperties() returns a reference valid from initialise() through shutdown(); members outside that window dereference a null pointer.
START_JUCE_APPLICATION(PluginHostApp) is the only program entry point — no main() exists.
fileLogger is installed as the global juce::Logger before any other subsystem starts, and cleared after iconMenu in shutdown().
gotchas: Command-line flag `-multi-instance=<name>` both prefixes the settings filename (so each instance has its own preferences) and is the only way moreThanOneInstanceAllowed() returns true.
On macOS the dock icon is hidden in initialise(); the dock is only made visible while a plugin editor or the PluginListWindow is open.
Static_assert at the top requires JUCE_PLUGINHOST_VST3 or JUCE_PLUGINHOST_AU to be defined — silent compile-time guard against misconfigured builds.
